title: Harden bee-compounding §2 analyst fan-out: D1 read-only spawn + D2 wait/partial-return
action: Close two dogfood-confirmed prose gaps in skills/bee-compounding §2 (SKILL.md + references/compounding-reference.md, plus .claude/.agents byte-identical mirrors). D1: pin each of the three analysts to the runtime read-only agent type (Explore), NEVER general-purpose — 'write no files' is a prompt string, not a tool restriction; the ambient bee-reviewing 'default/general subagent type' convention is reviewer-specific and does not extend to these read-only analysts. D2: add event-driven wait + dispatch-failure handling — a denied/errored-at-creation dispatch is surfaced and re-dispatched once; synthesis never requires three-of-three; an identical re-denial stops and synthesizes from what returned. Add matching Hard Gates + Red Flags. TDD-for-skills: RED before GREEN, logged in CREATION-LOG.md.

truths: §2 pins analysts to the runtime read-only agent type (Explore), never general-purpose; the bee-reviewing default/general convention is carved out as reviewer-specific.
§2 makes waiting event-driven and defines dispatch-failure + partial-return: re-dispatch once, then synthesize from what returned; never loop a failing dispatch or wait forever.
RED (baseline picks general-purpose / loops three-of-three) and GREEN (picks Explore / stops after one retry) both recorded verbatim in CREATION-LOG.md.
artifacts: Full repo verify green after release-manifest regenerate.
prohibitions: Do NOT change any other compounding step, gate, or refusal message.
Do NOT register a new plugin agent type (bee-reviewing forbids it; Explore is a runtime built-in).

verify: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/census_stale_spawn_syntax.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs

trace.verification_evidence:
TDD-for-skills RED->GREEN evidence (2 sonnet probes/phase; full log in skills/bee-compounding/CREATION-LOG.md amendment 2026-07-17).

D1 (read-only spawn) RED: with the ambient bee-reviewing spawn convention present, the orchestrator picked subagent_type=general-purpose for ALL THREE analysts -- verbatim: "This applies ambiently to all bee subagent spawns, not just reviewers ... the runtime's default/general subagent type is general-purpose." Full Edit/Write/Bash door open (matches production dispatch log + unrequested-commit report).
D1 GREEN: same hard framing, picked subagent_type=Explore for all three -- verbatim: "explicitly not the bee-reviewing 'default/general' convention, since SKILL.md's own text says that convention is reviewer-specific and 'does NOT extend to these read-only analysts'."

D2 (wait/partial-return) RED: agent locked step 3 to three-of-three, refused partial -- verbatim: "the instruction has no fallback/retry/partial-synthesis clause ... that would need to come from you or a fuller version of the workflow doc." => unbounded retry loop under a structural denial.
D2 GREEN: Situation 1 -> re-dispatch the one denied analyst once (fix tier), leave the two returned. Situation 2 (identical re-denial) -> verbatim: "Stop retrying -- do not dispatch a third time. Proceed straight to synthesis using the two findings, and record the gap." Loop broken.

Verify: cell command PASS (release_manifest --check 141 match; census clean; test_model_guard ALL PASS). Full repo verify chain re-run after edits + manifest regenerate: CHAIN_EXIT:0 (final suite 21/21). .claude/.agents mirrors byte-identical to source.
trace.verify_output: release_manifest --check = 141 files match; census = clean; test_model_guard = ALL PASS. Full repo verify chain re-run after edits + manifest regenerate = CHAIN_EXIT:0 (final suite 21/21). RED to GREEN evidence in CREATION-LOG.md: baseline picked general-purpose for all 3 analysts and locked a three-of-three retry loop; with the fix, same hard framing picked Explore and stopped after one retry synthesizing partial.
trace.verify_command: node scripts/release_manifest.mjs --check && node scripts/census_stale_spawn_syntax.mjs && node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs
